title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Video explaining Pi Agent, described as a unique agentic system with a "harness layer" that enables different use cases like OpenClaw. Compares Pi against other coding-focused agents including Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity, evaluating how it handles increasing complexity in the harness layer as products ship with more integrated features.
